race.description: John Frith Memorial / Morgans Bracelet Handicap
race.comment: GRAND CRUSADER (10) built on a nice third two starts back at Esk with success over 1200m at Dalby a week ago, getting home by 3.5 lengths. Steps up a level but he is worth serious consideration. THIS IS ONE (5) is racing well. Scored at Miles two back then finished third, beaten one length, over 1100m at Gold Coast at the latest appearance two weeks ago. Reunites with jockey Bailie Baker who knows him well, including three wins while aboard and rates among the leading chances. MISTREY EMPEROR (3) finished second when resuming two runs back at Wandoan then progressed nicely last time out to score by 2.5 lengths as public elect over 1100m at Charleville. Needs to be at his best to beat this field but he can win again. OAKFIELD BADGER (9) turned in a moderate effort last start when 7 lengths from the winner in seventh over 1200m at Wyong. This much easier and can figure in the finish this time.
